Technical Program Manager

I help teams see what is really happening in delivery: the blockers, owners, risks, and decisions that get lost between Jira, Confluence, and status meetings.

Contact LinkedIn GitHub Writing

What I make visible

01 What the tickets say versus what the work shows.

02 The owner, date, and next move for each blocker.

03 Updates that leadership can read without a meeting.

Resume

Technical program execution, written for fast review.

A short view of the work I want to be hired for: clearer delivery signal, cleaner operating rhythm, and less status theater.

Current focus

Technical Program Manager

Delivery planning and operating rhythm

Helping cross-functional teams turn scattered Jira, Confluence, and meeting updates into a plan people can actually review and act on.

cross-functional deliveryJira and Confluencerisk and blocker managementleadership updatesdelivery follow-through

Current focus

AI-assisted planning and documentation

Practical workflow design

Using AI to make planning and documentation faster without letting drafts outrun the source material or the human review.

AI-assisted workflowsplanning notescleaner documentationsource checkshuman review

Strengths

Where I am useful

I am strongest in messy delivery environments: many owners, unclear blockers, scattered updates, and leadership that needs the truth without extra ceremony.

turning roadmap intent into execution plansdependency and blocker trackingJira and Confluence cleanupstatus updates people can trustAI-assisted planning supportconcise written follow-through
